problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: The key to What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? is Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus — specifically Sleep-dependent memory consolidation — which would help 75,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
